Home/The Ritual

The Ritual

Skincare, slowed down. A daily ceremony of face & self-care, guided by Ayurveda and made with Cleanse.

Begin
Self-care as ceremony

A ritual is not a routine. It is a few honest minutes you give back to yourself, to breathe, to touch your skin with intention, and to let nature do the rest.

Every Cleanse formula is crafted to be felt, not rushed. Follow the morning ritual to wake and protect, or the evening ritual to undo the day and restore. Each step layers in the order your skin asks for it.

Awaken

Five unhurried steps to greet the day with skin that feels clean, calm and protected.

5 steps · ≈ 7 minutes
01
Cleanse60 sec

Neem & Rose Gel Cleanser

Massage a coin-sized amount over damp skin in slow upward circles, then rinse with cool water.

Sweeps away the night without ever stripping, skin is left soft, never tight.

PurifiesBalances
02
Mist15 sec

Rose & Vetiver Hydrosol

Mist twice from a hand's distance, then press into the skin with warm palms.

Restores the skin's natural pH and quietly wakes the senses.

HydratesTones
03
Treat30 sec

Saffron Vitamin C Serum

Warm three or four drops between fingertips and press in, lifting away from the eyes.

Brightens dullness and evens tone with cold-pressed Kashmiri saffron.

BrightensAntioxidant
04
Hydrate30 sec

Kokum Day Moisturiser

Smooth a pearl of cream over face and neck in upward strokes.

Seals in moisture for a weightless, dewy finish that lasts till dusk.

NourishesPlumps
05
Protect30 sec

Mineral Veil SPF 40

Finish with a generous, even layer, always the final step, reapplied through the day.

A sheer mineral shield against UV light and city pollution.

ProtectsEveryday
The pause

Breathe. This moment is yours.

Inhale · Exhale

Between cleansing and treating, close your eyes for three slow breaths. Self-care begins the moment you decide to be present.

The essentials

Build your ritual

Everything your skin needs, nothing it doesn't. Assemble your own ceremony from the Cleanse collection.

CleanseNeem & Rose Gel Cleanser
MistRose & Vetiver Hydrosol
TreatSaffron Vitamin C Serum
HydrateKokum Day Moisturiser
ProtectMineral Veil SPF 40
Shop the collectionOur story

“Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.”
